about_quotes.speaker: Hubert Laws
about_quotes.evidence: I found John Murtaugh, who was an arranger... we always talked about doing a record together... he ended up doing this record.
about_quotes.doc_title: Hubert Laws — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Kent Jordan
about_quotes.evidence: he gave me all of the arrangements off of that CD... I performed tunes like “Pensativa,” John Murtaugh did “Equinox,” “Motherless Child.”
about_quotes.doc_title: Kent Jordan interviewed by Monk Rowe, Rome, New York, August 22, 2006
